claim_boundary: reduced-Pauli entanglement/tomography check only; no quantum advantage, backend-general, or scalable tomography claim
recovery_note: Counts hydrated after both queued Kingston jobs reached DONE; main per-circuit transpilation metadata was not present in the pending artifact, while readout metadata was recovered from readout_submission_metadata.
submission_recovery_note: Main job was submitted by the guarded runner; readout job was submitted independently because the guarded runner waits for the main result before launching readout.
